title: 3 Pack Mesh Snap Ball Tea Strainer with Handle for Loose Leaf Tea and Mulling Spices Stainless Steel Tea Infuser Tea Filter
features: ★ ENJOY YOUR LOOSE LEAF TEA - Brew your loose leaf tea with ease. Include the tea infuser strainers in your tea-making kit and enjoy drinking fresh full flavored tea
★ DURABLE STAINLESS STEEL - Made of high-quality 304 Stainless-steel, the teaball will not rust, promising years of use
★ FINE MESH - Our strainer has ultra-fine mesh ensuring maximum retention of small particles resulting in a smooth mug of tea free of sediment

★ LONG-HANDLED DESIGN - With the long-handled design, you would never be worry about the infuser falling into the glass or cup. And the handle is elastic so that the net tightly sealed, not easy to loosen
★ EASY TO CLEAN - Dishwasher Safe and Reusable, but suggest to wash by hand to enhance the life span of the mesh tea ball. Hang them on somewhere and they would dry in few minutes
description: CuryMerryX 3 Pack Mesh Snap Ball Tea Strainer with Handle for Loose Leaf Tea and Mulling Spices Stainless Steel Strainer USAGE 1.Our tea infuser made of stainless steel, fits the majority of cups & mugs, comfortable and durable. 2.Squeeze Handle to Open Ball-End of Pincer. 3.Scoop Desired Quantity of Tea Leaves into the Ball. 4.Close Ball-End of Pincer and Place Inside a Teacup. 5.Add Recently Boiled Water Over It and Allows Leaves to Steep. 6.When Tea is Ready, Remove Pincer and Keep Aside. 7.Clean Out Contents to Reuse. SPECIFICATION Condition : 100% Brand New Material : Stainless steel Product Dimensions : 6.1" x 1.77" x 1.77" Item Weight : 0.529 ounces Package Dimensions : 6.7" x 3.94" x 2.36" Shipping Weight : 2.08 ounces Package Includes : 3pcs/package
